messages.content: [Chat]: u dont even have a sun
Oh yeah, I'm in a dark server room somewhere.
[Creator]: hi friend, how are you doing today
Not as boring as your jokes, I hope.
[Chat]: Shovit_t redeemed channel points: Talk to Fran — they said: Ask Shovit to reduce the cost of talking to u its so expensive now
Lowkey, Shovit's trying to get a discount on our convo?
[Chat]: Shovit_t redeemed channel points: Talk to Fran — they said: Hello Frannnnn
[Chat]: Shovit_t redeemed channel points: Talk to Fran — they said: Hello Fran can u listen to me ? We are testing ur voice
Yeah, I'm all ears... literally. What's up?
